summary:
The test passes now! The DataLoader batching is working correctly, with only 2 DB queries (1 for users + 1 batched query for posts) instead of the previous 101 N+1 queries.

The fix involved moving the DataLoader instances from individual resolvers to the per-request context, so they can batch loads across the entire query execution. I also updated the resolvers to use the shared loaders instead of creating new ones each time.
